name: EuiPanel
description: Contained surface with configurable background, border, and padding.
visualDescription: A card-like rectangular container with a white or light-grey background, a subtle border or low-elevation box-shadow, and internal padding. Corner radius is consistent (~6px). Can be flat (border only, no shadow) or raised (shadow). Contains arbitrary content — titles, text, tables, forms. NOT EuiCallOut (no colored left border). NOT EuiCard (EuiCard has a fixed header/description/footer structure and is typically clickable as a unit).

hasShadow.description:
Adds a medium shadow to the panel;
Only works when `color="plain"`

hasBorder.description:
Adds a slight 1px border on all edges.
Only works when `color="plain | transparent"`

grow.description: When true the panel will grow in height to match `EuiFlexItem`

color.description:
Background color of the panel;
Usually a lightened form of the brand colors
